content: The intrinsic reward signals from curiosity-driven RL methods (ICM/RND) can be repurposed as active selection criteria for state storage in 2024-2025 SOTA episodic memory agents, where only high-surprise uncached transitions get retained instead of uniform sampling. This replaces generic diversity-based storage pruning with measurement-aligned surprise that already integrates with the agent's existing learning objective.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
